app.name: HotelOS
app.tagline: The Intelligent Operating System for Hotels
app.brandStatement: One command center for occupancy, revenue, and daily operations — built for hotels and hotel groups that run on real numbers, not guesswork.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.
login.accountDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact your administrator.
login.secureFooter: Your session is encrypted. Access is logged for security.

changePassword.title: Set a new password
changePassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
changePassword.temporaryNotice: You're signing in with a temporary password. Choose a new password to continue.

errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: New password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.MISMATCH: New password and confirmation do not match.

admin.title: Platform Administration
admin.subtitle: Platform Owner console — not part of the hotel-facing product

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.name: Hotel Name
hotels.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, city, or country…
hotels.createdSuccess: Hotel created. Share these credentials with the Hotel Admin securely — this password is shown only once:

users.title: Users
users.resetSuccess: Password reset. Share this temporary password securely — shown only once:
users.createdSuccess: User created. Share this temporary password securely — shown only once:
users.mustChangePassword: Must change password on next login
users.forceChangeSuccess: This account must now set a new password on next login. Existing sessions were signed out.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.note: Roles are fixed in code for v0.1 (DECISIONS.md D10) — no custom role editor yet.

featureFlags.title: Feature Flags
featureFlags.note: Per-hotel module enablement. Unbuilt agent modules stay off until their full implementation ships.

support.title: Support Access
support.note: Read-only support view of a hotel's current state — every access is audit-logged (Architecture §4 Super Admin path).

settings.title: Platform Settings
settings.note: Non-secret operational configuration. Secrets are never displayed here.

reportsUpload.title: Upload Opera Reports
reportsUpload.description: Manager Flash reports are fully processed in this build. Other report types are accepted and stored, but currently require manual entry (see README).

errors.DUPLICATE: This exact file has already been uploaded.
errors.MODULE_DISABLED: Report uploads are not enabled for this hotel.
errors.STORAGE_UNAVAILABLE: Upload storage is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly or contact support if this continues.
errors.UPLOAD_FAILED: The upload could not be completed. Please try again.

reportsUpload.dragDropHint: Drag and drop PDF files here, or

deleteErrors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to delete this report.
deleteErrors.ALREADY_FINALIZED: This report has been finalized and cannot be deleted.

reportsReview.title: Review Extracted Values
reportsReview.genericNotice: This report type does not have a dedicated extraction adapter yet — no structured fields were extracted. Raw text is stored for reference. Manual entry only (see README).
reportsReview.processing: Still processing — refresh in a moment.
reportsReview.errorState: Extraction failed for this report. See the error below, or re-upload.
reportsReview.unvalidatedNotice: Manager Flash extraction has not yet been validated against real Opera exports. Verify every value against the source PDF before relying on it.
reportsReview.finalized: This report has been finalized. Metrics are now live on Mission Control.

missionControl.noHotels: You are not yet assigned to a hotel. Contact your administrator.
missionControl.noReports: No reports uploaded yet for this hotel. Upload your first report to see insights here.
missionControl.notFinalized: Reports have been uploaded but not yet finalized. Review and finalize a report to see metrics here.

aiSummaryUnavailable.NO_DATA: No finalized metrics yet — upload and finalize a report to generate a summary.
aiSummaryUnavailable.NOT_CONFIGURED: AI summary is not available — no AI provider is configured for this deployment.
aiSummaryUnavailable.PROVIDER_ERROR: AI summary could not be generated right now. Try again shortly.

comparisons.title: Comparisons
comparisons.subtitle: Real movement between report dates — every value here comes from a finalized report, nothing estimated.
comparisons.noMetricsYet: No finalized metrics yet — upload and finalize a report to see comparisons here.

timeline.title: Mission Timeline
timeline.empty: No activity yet for this hotel.
